name: Round Sky Personal Loan Affiliate Program
description_short: Round Sky connects consumers with personal loan offers up to $5,000, specializing in helping people with less-than-perfect credit find lending options.
description_long: Round Sky is a leading online lending marketplace that connects borrowers with personal loan offers. Specializing in short-term and installment loans for consumers with imperfect credit, Round Sky uses a network of lenders to match applicants with competitive offers. Their platform provides a simple online application process with quick decisions.
affiliate_program: Up to $250 per lead, no commission caps, real-time reporting
pros: Up to $250 per lead with no commission caps
Multiple payout methods (ACH, PayPal, Wire, Check)
Copy-paste website widgets for quick setup
Dual-level sub-id tracking and custom pixel support
cons: Affiliate network only — not a direct lender for consumers
Requires existing website traffic or marketing skills to generate commissions
API integration may require technical knowledge
Limited information about affiliate support structure
Income dependent entirely on affiliate's marketing effectiveness
diagnosis: Round Sky is a personal loan affiliate and lead generation network designed for publishers and webmasters, not a direct consumer lender. It offers commission-based earnings for referring qualified loan applicants. Best suited for users with existing traffic, marketing capabilities, or developer skills — not for consumers directly seeking loans.
